name: ERPSMART Builder Publish Readiness Plan Artifact Contract
purpose: Define the diagnostic publish-readiness plan artifact generated by the deep conflict analyzer.

artifact_fields.definition_checksum: Builder definition checksum at analysis time

cleanup_policy: Diagnostic artifacts may be deleted by a future cleanup job if they are uniquely owned by the Builder definition and can be regenerated.
agent_notes: AI Builder Agent may read the diagnostic artifact.
AI Builder Agent must not treat the artifact as a runtime module or publish manifest.
AI Builder Agent must not execute publish, migrations, runtime writes, uninstall, rollback, or runtime deletion.
